faqs.question: How much does carpenter ant control cost in Sunnyside?
faqs.answer: Carpenter ant control in Sunnyside typically ranges from $350 to $2,000 depending on the severity of the infestation, property size, and number of treatments required. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have carpenter ants in my Sunnyside home?
faqs.answer: Signs include piles of sawdust near baseboards or window sills, rustling sounds inside walls, large black ants (especially with wings during spring), and wood damage. Sunnyside's older buildings with wooden beams and frames are especially susceptible to carpenter ant damage.

faqs.question: Are carpenter ant treatments safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and eco-friendly treatment methods that are safe for children and pets when applied by our licensed technicians. We provide clear instructions on any temporary precautions needed during treatment.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a carpenter ant problem in Sunnyside?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service throughout Sunnyside and surrounding Queens neighborhoods. Our technicians are familiar with the area and can quickly reach your property to assess and treat carpenter ant infestations before structural damage worsens.
